title: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to Participate in the Bank of America 2026 Health Care Conference
author: Na
description: Supernus Pharmaceuticals announced that President and CEO Jack A. Khattar will participate in a fireside chat at the Bank of America 2026 Health Care Conference on May 12, 2026. The company reported strong Q1 2026 financial results with total revenues of $207.7 million, representing a 39% increase year-over-year, with combined revenues from four growth products reaching $149.1 million.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance with 39% year-over-year revenue growth in Q1 2026 and significant growth in key product lines ($149.1 million combined revenue). CEO participation in major healthcare investor conference indicates confidence and active investor engagement. The diverse CNS portfolio and development pipeline suggest positive growth trajectory.

title: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to Participate in March Investor Conferences
author: Na
description: Supernus Pharmaceuticals announced that management will participate in three major healthcare investor conferences in March 2026: TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference (March 2), Jefferies Biotech on the Beach Summit (March 10), and Barclays 28th Annual Global Healthcare Conference (March 11). Live webcasts will be available for select presentations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is routine corporate disclosure regarding conference participation. It demonstrates active investor engagement and market presence but contains no material business developments, financial results, or strategic announcements that would indicate positive or negative sentiment.

title: Supernus Stock Is Up 31% This Past Year but Still 20% Below 2018 Highs as One Fund Scales Back
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Aristotle Capital Boston reduced its holdings in Pharmaceuticals by 503,122 shares in Q3, decreasing its position value by approximately $10.9 million. Despite a 31% stock price increase over the past year, the company remains below its 2018 highs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The stock has shown positive performance with 31% growth, but faces challenges with uneven profitability and remains below historical highs. The fund's partial sell-off suggests cautious investor outlook.
Mentioned as a top holding of Aristotle Capital Boston, but no specific performance details were provided in the article.

title: Supernus Pharmaceuticals Announces Expiration of Hart-Scott-Rodino Waiting Period for Sage Therapeutics, Inc. Tender Offer
author: Globe Newswire
description: Supernus Pharmaceuticals announced the expiration of the HSR Act waiting period for its proposed acquisition of Sage Therapeutics, with the tender offer continuing and set to expire on July 30, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Actively pursuing strategic acquisition of Sage Therapeutics, expanding its neuroscience portfolio and demonstrating corporate growth initiative
Being acquired at $8.50 per share plus potential contingent value rights, indicating a structured transition with potential future value

title: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to Host Conference Call and Webcast on February 25, 2025, to Discuss Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
author: N/A
description: Supernus Pharmaceuticals, a biopharmaceutical company focused on central nervous system diseases, will host a conference call on February 25, 2025, to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financial results.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article announces that Supernus Pharmaceuticals will host a conference call to discuss its financial results, indicating the company's ongoing business activities and performance.
